name: keyvaluelist
title: KeyValueList
description: Label/value rows with hairline separators — resource details, DNS records, trade info.

files.content:
Label/value rows with hairline separators — resource details, DNS records, trade info.

```jsx
<KeyValueList items={[
  { label: 'Region', value: 'eu-west-1' },
  { label: 'IPv4', value: '203.0.113.7', mono: true },
]} />
```
